arts.ttl: Newcastle United hold talks with 18-year-old Spanish starlet over free transfer with Malaga winger's contract up in the summer
arts.sum: Cordero, nicknamed Antonito, made his debut for Malaga in 2023 and has become a regular starter this season. He has caught the eye in Spain for his impact at La Rosaleda.

arts.ttl: Miguel Almiron returns to Atlanta United after transfer from Newcastle
arts.sum: Almirón left Atlanta in 2019 to join the Premier League side for a reported $26 million fee, the highest in MLS at the time. Almirón joined Atlanta in 2017 as a designated player, and helped the team win the MLS Cup title in 2018.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs. Fulham: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Newcastle and Fulham, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Newcastle lineup vs. Fulham: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Newcastle United could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Fulham.

arts.ttl: Fulham lineup vs. Newcastle: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Fulham could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Preview: Newcastle United vs. Fulham - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Fulham, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Marco Silva confirms Harry Wilson injury blow as Fulham boss reveals transfer plans
arts.sum: Marco Silva reveals the extent of Harry Wilson's injury as the Fulham manager opens up on his transfer plans ahead of Monday's deadline.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's January transfer risk as PSR-boosting deal confirmed
arts.sum: Howe struck a slightly different tone as Almiron's exit was confirmed on Thursday afternoon, admitting that it was the 'right move at the right time' for the player and his family. What happens between now and Monday's 11pm deadline could have a big say on how the business end of Newcastle's season unfolds.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United are facing a pivotal moment as St James' Park witnesses season-defining games - John Gibson
arts.sum: They beat us 3-1 at Craven Cottage early doors when we weren't invincible away and apart from Champions League qualification points being essential, confidence must not be eroded before the considerable challenge of Arsenal confronts us. There were reasons for that defeat back in mid-September, United's first of the season.

arts.ttl: Miguel Almirón returns to Atlanta United - Newcastle United receive sizeable fee
arts.sum: Major League Soccer side Atlanta United have brought back Miguel Almirón from Newcastle United. The Paraguayan midfielder has signed a contract until 2027 with a club option...
